entity.summary: Regulated global centralized cryptocurrency exchange from the Backpack ecosystem. It beta-launched in November 2023, expanded into regulated European derivatives trading in 2025, and launched its native BP token in March 2026.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2023-11-01 as a month-level beta-launch marker because first-party history identifies November 2023 but does not preserve an exact public beta day. Backpack Wallet and Mad Lads are related products, not separate exchange identities. Backpack EU is modeled as a regional expansion of the same exchange.

expected.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2024 under the Backpack brand, offering spot and derivatives-oriented trading through jurisdiction-specific regulated entities and regional platforms.
expected.notes: The previous seed description is replaced with a reviewed entity summary. The 2024 year-level launch and United Arab Emirates origin are retained because current first-party materials support active exchange operation and regional entity structure but do not establish a more precise global launch date suitable for canonical correction.

changes.summary: Regulated global centralized cryptocurrency exchange from the Backpack ecosystem. It beta-launched in November 2023, expanded into regulated European derivatives trading in 2025, and launched its native BP token in March 2026.
changes.notes: HEI uses 2023-11-01 as a month-level beta-launch marker because first-party history identifies November 2023 but does not preserve an exact public beta day. Backpack Wallet and Mad Lads are related products, not separate exchange identities. Backpack EU is modeled as a regional expansion of the same exchange.

events.title: Backpack Exchange beta-launched
events.description: Backpack opened the beta version of its regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange after receiving a Dubai VASP license.
events.notes: The day is normalized to the start of the first-party documented November 2023 launch month.

events.title: Backpack EU launched regulated derivatives trading
events.description: Backpack launched its European platform under a MiFID II license and CySEC regulation with more than 40 perpetual-futures pairs.
events.notes: Regional product expansion within the continuing Backpack Exchange entity.

events.title: Backpack launched the BP token
events.description: Backpack launched its native BP token and opened BP/USD spot trading on the exchange.
events.notes: Recorded as a major exchange-ecosystem milestone rather than a new exchange identity.

evidence.title: Backpack Exchange official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current exchange operation and trading products.

evidence.title: Backpack Exchange legal disclosures
evidence.notes: The legal materials provide jurisdiction-specific entity and service context for Backpack Exchange.

evidence.title: About Backpack
evidence.notes: First-party timeline records the November 2023 Backpack Exchange beta launch and current global operation.

evidence.title: A Brief History of Backpack
evidence.notes: First-party history states that the regulated exchange beta-launched in November 2023.

evidence.title: Backpack announces exchange launch and Dubai VASP license
evidence.notes: Project-issued release announces the November private beta and the Dubai exchange-services license.

evidence.title: Backpack EU Launches: Regulated Crypto Derivatives Trading for European Traders
evidence.notes: First-party launch announcement describes the MiFID II and CySEC-regulated European platform.

evidence.title: Backpack Exchange to Launch Backpack Token (BP)
evidence.notes: First-party announcement records BP/USD spot trading and the native-token launch on March 23, 2026.
